sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ وَلِيدٌ مَعَ أَبِيهِ إِلَى الْمَطْعَمِ الشَّعْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Walid je otišao sa ocem u narodni restoran.
sentences.translationEn: Walid went with his father to the popular restaurant.

sentences.translation: Naručili su falafel, hljeb i tahini.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered falafel, bread, and tahini.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ رَخِيصًا وَلَكِنَّهُ لَذِيذٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila jeftina ali veoma ukusna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was cheap but very delicious.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ وَلِيدٌ: هَذَا أَحْسَنُ فَلَافِلٍ أَكَلْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Walid je rekao: Ovo je najbolji falafel koji sam jeo.
sentences.translationEn: Walid said: This is the best falafel I have ever eaten.
